name: Green Bean, Zucchini and Potato Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 pound fresh green beans, trimmed halved crosswise
8 ounces russet potatoes, peeled and cut into 1-inch cubes
1 can italian-style tomatoes, drained juices reserved
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a heavy large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add onion and sauté for 5 minutes until translucent.
3. Add green beans and cayenne pepper; sauté until onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
4. Add zucchini, potatoes, and parsley to the skillet.
5. Pour tomato juices over the vegetables.
6. Bring mixture to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and cover pot.
8. Simmer until potatoes are tender, stirring frequently for about 45 minutes.
9. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
10. Remove from heat. (Can be prepared up to 1 day ahead; cover and refrigerate.)
11. Serve warm or at room temperature.
6-8 Servings
Notes: Greeks call this fassolakia Iadera. It's a traditional vegetable mixture often eaten cold, accompanied by country bread and feta cheese.
